mapper.sql: SELECT p.payment_id, p.contract_id, p.fee_type, p.fee_name, p.period_start, p.period_end, p.amount_due, p.amount_paid, p.pay_deadline, p.pay_time, CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '1' THEN '1' WHEN p.pay_status = '3' THEN '3' WHEN p.pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN '2' ELSE COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') END AS pay_status, p.remind_status, p.remind_time, p.remark, p.park_id, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.direction, p.tax_rate, p.special_bill_type, p.late_fee_start_days, p.late_fee_ratio, p.late_fee_cap, p.company_name, p.attachment_name, p.attachment_url, p.selected_room_ids, p.selected_room_name, p.selected_building_name, c.contract_no, c.customer_name, c.contract_name, COALESCE(p.selected_room_name, c.room_name) AS room_name, COALESCE(p.selected_building_name, c.building_name) AS building_name, c.contract_status, CASE c.contract_status WHEN '0' THEN '待审批' WHEN '1' THEN '生效' WHEN '2' THEN '已到期' WHEN '3' THEN '已续签' WHEN '4' THEN '已退租' WHEN '5' THEN '待盖章' WHEN '6' THEN '退租中' WHEN '7' THEN '退租交接中' WHEN '8' THEN '房屋验收中' ELSE '未知' END AS contract_status_name, pay_cwr.process_ins_id AS payment_process_ins_id, pay_cwr.process_status AS payment_approval_status, pay_cwr.current_node AS payment_current_node_name, pay_cwr.print_file_url AS payment_file_url, law_cwr.process_ins_id AS overdue_process_ins_id, law_cwr.process_status AS overdue_approval_status, law_cwr.current_node AS overdue_current_node_name, law_cwr.print_file_url AS overdue_file_url, term_cwr.process_ins_id AS termination_process_ins_id, term_cwr.process_status AS termination_approval_status, term_cwr.current_node AS termination_current_node_name, term_cwr.print_file_url AS termination_file_url FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT payment_id, MAX(record_id) AS record_id FROM biz_contract_workflow_record WHERE business_type = 'contract_payment' AND COALESCE(process_def_key, '') != 'invoice' AND COALESCE(form_key, '') != 'invoice' AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY payment_id ) latest_pay_cwr ON latest_pay_cwr.payment_id = p.payment_id LEFT JOIN biz_contract_workflow_record pay_cwr ON pay_cwr.record_id = latest_pay_cwr.record_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT payment_id, MAX(record_id) AS record_id FROM biz_contract_workflow_record WHERE business_type = 'contract_overdue_legal' AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY payment_id ) latest_law_cwr ON latest_law_cwr.payment_id = p.payment_id LEFT JOIN biz_contract_workflow_record law_cwr ON law_cwr.record_id = latest_law_cwr.record_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT contract_id, MAX(record_id) AS record_id FROM biz_contract_workflow_record WHERE business_type = 'contract_termination' AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY contract_id ) latest_term_cwr ON latest_term_cwr.contract_id = p.contract_id LEFT JOIN biz_contract_workflow_record term_cwr ON term_cwr.record_id = latest_term_cwr.record_id

if.test: payment != null and payment.direction != null and payment.direction != ''
payment != null and payment.feeType != null and payment.feeType != ''
payment != null and payment.payStatus != null and payment.payStatus != ''
payment != null and payment.contractNo != null and payment.contractNo != ''
payment != null and payment.customerName != null and payment.customerName != ''
payment != null and payment.buildingNameQuery != null and payment.buildingNameQuery != ''
payment != null and payment.hideFuture != null and payment.hideFuture
payment != null and payment.settleStatus != null and payment.settleStatus != ''

mapper.select:
AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline < CURDATE()
ORDER BY p.pay_deadline ASC, p.payment_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') = '0' AND p.pay_deadline >= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partial_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.remind_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reminded_count, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_due), 0) AS amount_due, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_paid), 0) AS amount_paid, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_due), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_paid), 0) AS amount_pending FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id

SELECT c.contract_id AS contractId, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.contract_name AS contractName, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.room_id AS roomId, c.room_ids AS roomIds, c.room_name AS roomName, c.building_id AS buildingId, c.building_ids AS buildingIds, c.building_name AS buildingName, c.park_id AS parkId, p.name AS parkName, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.late_fee_ratio AS lateFeeRatio, c.late_fee_cap AS lateFeeCap FROM biz_contract c LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = c.park_id WHERE c.del_flag = '0'
AND c.park_id = #{parkId}
AND ( c.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.contract_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC, c.contract_id DESC LIMIT 200
